_doc: Single source of truth for which context this repo runs as (meta = framework repo authoring the templates; downstream = materialised project consuming the framework). Read by factory-pr-review Phase 0 (coherence audit) and by any future consumer that needs context-aware behaviour. To extend: bump version, add keys under audit.* — never break existing keys.

lock_step_pairs.doc: Hook scripts must mirror between meta .claude/hooks/ and template tree.
Settings JSON must mirror between meta and template tree (merge-preserve in template).
Governance scripts (governance-onedit, governance-onprompt, governance-oncompact) must mirror between meta scripts/ and template scripts/ trees.

Universal CLAUDE.md clauses that must be byte-identical between root CLAUDE.md (meta) and the template counterpart. Verified by check-lockstep-pairs.sh which extracts each section listed in universal_sections (content between the H2 heading and the next H2 heading or EOF) and diffs both sides. Sections with legitimate context-specific divergence (Governance Scope wording, Pre-Action Gate steps, Core Protocols table, Generation Standards manifest path, Mandatory Law #1 addendum, Triage default, INVARIANT 4 manifest path, Workflow / Hard Gates / Living Catalogs in template only) are intentionally NOT listed here — they are governed by CLAUDE.md § What Lives Where and verified during human review (factory-pr-review Phase 0 Detector 16-meta operates on whole-file lock-step pairs, not section-level here).
